race.comment: EPHEMERAL (8) nice filly who finally delivered first-up with a commanding win over 1200m at this track on a heavy (9) surface. Should be even better now and can keep the winning momentum going. MAY BE BUBBLES (10) two-starts for the new yard have been sound with a first-up win at Warren. Jumped in trip second-up with a game second at Warren over this journey. Has the ability to overcome the sticky gate. OLUFSEN (1) must overcome the outside draw and extra distance today on the quick back-up. Savaged the line in the heavy (10) going with a narrow third over 1005m at Coffs Harbour on June 28. Place preferred. JAGERSCHNITZEL (3) capable gelding who gets a much better set-up for this third-up. Faded late when up in trip to run seventh over 1300m at Scone. Near his top and can give a ton of cheek.
